mainEntity.name: Is IBBI registration mandatory for business valuation?

acceptedAnswer.text: IBBI registration is mandatory for valuations under Companies Act Section 247 (share allotment, buyback, merger schemes) and IBC (CIRP, liquidation). For income tax and FEMA valuations, a CA or merchant banker can provide valuation, but IBBI-registered valuer reports carry higher credibility.

mainEntity.name: How much does a business valuation cost in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Fees depend on company size, complexity, purpose, and number of methods required. We provide a fixed-fee quote after understanding the engagement scope. Contact +91-77000 89597 for a no-obligation discussion.

mainEntity.name: Can you value a company for FEMA share pricing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We regularly provide FEMA-compliant valuations for share issuance to foreign investors (FC-GPR), share transfers between residents and non-residents (FC-TRS), and exit pricing under FEMA regulations. Our valuations comply with RBI pricing guidelines.
